chapter_question: How do all normal sections of a surface organize into principal curvatures?
inspection_targets: Euler formula appears as a direction-dependent curvature plot.
Sections through one tangent point reveal curvature extrema.
The proof tracks a quadratic form on tangent directions.
A surface model connects meridian and parallel curvatures.

source_span.focus: Introduces normal curvature of surfaces and the principal curvatures that organize all directional curvatures.
source_span.label: Chapter 10
source_span.title: The Principal Curvatures of a Surface
topics: Normal sections through a surface point
Curvature behavior on surfaces of revolution
Mean and Gaussian curvature as products and averages
